recommendations.title: Diana: In Her Own Words
recommendations.overview: Using home videos recorded by her voice coach, Diana takes us through the story of her life.

recommendations.title: Appendage
recommendations.overview: After hitting a breaking point, Hannah's inner thoughts physicalize into a monstrous creature that threatens to upend her life.

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: The Surfer
recommendations.overview: A man returns to the idyllic beach of his childhood to surf with his son. When he is humiliated by a group of locals, the man is drawn into a conflict that keeps rising and pushes him to his breaking point.

recommendations.title: Scars
recommendations.overview: The story of a dysfunctional couple, whose problems will inevitably deteriorate their marriage and their son's life.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Caged
recommendations.overview: An African American male is imprisoned and placed in solitary confinement after being found guilty of murdering his wife, as he's haunted by internal demons and his dead wife, and pushed to the breaking point by an abusive female guard.

recommendations.title: STRAW
recommendations.overview: What will be her last straw? A devastatingly bad day pushes a hardworking single mother to the breaking point — and into a shocking act of desperation.
